mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, parent_id, domain_code, domain_name, domain_desc, icon, sort, status, menu_parent_id, table_prefix, config_key_prefix, default_app_type, default_layout_type, default_table_mode, domain_schema, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ai_lowcode_domain WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = '0'
AND ( domain_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR domain_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR domain_desc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_crud_config WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND domain_id = #{domainId} AND del_flag = '0' AND mode = 'CONFIG' AND build_mode = 'LOWCODE'

SELECT COUNT(1) AS appCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS publishedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN publish_status = 'DRAFT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS draftCount, COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(object_code, ''), config_key)) AS objectCount FROM ai_crud_config WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND domain_id = #{domainId} AND del_flag = '0' AND mode = 'CONFIG' AND build_mode = 'LOWCODE'

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(object_code, ''), config_key) AS objectCode, COALESCE(NULLIF(object_name, ''), NULLIF(app_name, ''), table_comment, config_key) AS objectName, app_name AS appName, config_key AS configKey, publish_status AS publishStatus, update_time AS updateTime FROM ai_crud_config WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND domain_id = #{domainId} AND del_flag = '0' AND mode = 'CONFIG' AND build_mode = 'LOWCODE' ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT v.id AS id, v.config_id AS configId, v.config_key AS configKey, c.app_name AS appName, COALESCE(NULLIF(v.object_code, ''), c.object_code) AS objectCode, COALESCE(NULLIF(v.object_name, ''), c.object_name) AS objectName, v.version_no AS versionNo, v.version_type AS versionType, v.remark AS remark, v.create_time AS createTime, v.create_by AS createBy FROM ai_crud_config_version v INNER JOIN ai_crud_config c ON c.tenant_id = v.tenant_id AND c.id = v.config_id AND c.del_flag = '0' WHERE v.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND v.domain_id = #{domainId} ORDER BY v.create_time DESC, v.id DESC LIMIT 10
